name: App Store MCP Server — App Reviews & Replies
what_it_does: App Store MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Apple App Store and Google Play Store reviews — fetching app reviews, monitoring ratings, replying to user reviews, analyzing review sentiment, and integrating mobile app store data into agent-driven developer relations and app quality management workflows.
use_cases: Monitoring and analyzing user reviews from mobile app quality agents
Automatically drafting review responses from developer relations agents
Tracking app ratings and sentiment trends from product analytics agents
Identifying and prioritizing user feedback from product management agents
Competitive app store research from market intelligence agents
Generating review response campaigns from customer success agents
not_for: Teams without App Store Connect or Google Play Console access
Bulk automated review responses without human oversight (may violate store policies)
best_when: A mobile app developer or developer relations team needs AI agents to monitor reviews, analyze sentiment, and draft responses for App Store and Google Play.
avoid_when: You don't have a mobile app on App Store/Google Play, or need general web review monitoring.

auth.notes: App Store Connect API key (JWT) required for iOS reviews. Google Play Developer API OAuth 2.0 for Android. Both require developer console access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: AppReply.co: free tier with limited features
pricing.paid_tiers: AppReply.co Pro: subscription for team features
pricing.notes: Community MCP from appreply.co. App Store Connect API and Google Play API are free with developer accounts.

performance.rate_limits: App Store Connect API: 100 requests/hour; Google Play API: quota-based

known_agent_gotchas: App Store Connect JWT auth requires API key private key management — complex setup
Google Play API OAuth requires service account or user OAuth flow
Review reply rate limits — App Store has strict limits on reply frequency
Both stores have content policies for review replies — agent responses must be reviewed
Community MCP from appreply.co — check for updates as store APIs evolve
Review scraping from public pages may violate Apple/Google ToS — use official APIs
agent_readiness.security_notes: App Store Connect JWT + Google Play OAuth. HTTPS enforced. Developer console credentials — store private keys securely. Review replies are public — have human review before posting. Community MCP.

security_score_components.security_notes: JWT + OAuth auth. HTTPS. Developer credentials — secure private key storage. Public replies need human review. Community MCP.
